steps.name: review-project-state
steps.description: Aggregate project state and present to researcher with RQ-status and cost-blocker analysis.

steps.name: discuss-decisions
steps.description: Structured rounds: propose RQ-closure tasks within $66 budget, agree minimum wave (TaskA + TaskE).

steps.name: apply-decisions
steps.description: Write 8 correction files, create t0029 (TaskA) and t0030 (TaskE) via /create-task.

steps.name: finalize
steps.description: Write results, step logs, run verificators, push, PR, merge.
